title: aira major
intro: Aira major, also known as meadow grass or wood meadow-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aira major include its ability to help reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for conditions such as eczema and acne. Aira major can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
